title: Remove stale beads merge attribute from .gitattributes
description:
Remove the '.beads/issues.jsonl merge=beads' line from .gitattributes.

Context: there is no registered 'beads' merge driver anywhere in the codebase (ConfigureMergeDriver only registers 'tick'). The attribute makes git silently fall back to default 3-way merge for beads JSONL files, which is wrong for an append-only log. Since we're not adding a beads driver, the line should be removed.

The beads importer (internal/beads/, cmd/tk/cmd/import.go, --import-beads flag in init) is NOT touched — only the merge attribute line.

File to change:
- .gitattributes: remove '# Use bd merge for beads JSONL files' comment and '.beads/issues.jsonl merge=beads' line

Run: grep 'beads' .gitattributes — should return nothing after the change
acceptance_criteria: .gitattributes has no beads-related lines; go test ./... still passes
